title: Cabinet paper – Census transformation – A promising future | Stats NZ
content:
## Cabinet paper  – Census transformation – A promising future
23 June 2017, 12:00pm
This paper presents our progress on investigating options for transforming the New Zealand census, beyond the modernised 2018 Census. It recommends that Statistics NZ be directed to actively work towards a future census based primarily on government administrative data, supported by redevelopment of its household surveys.
Census transformation – A promising future was signed by the Minister of Statistics on 20 October 2015, considered by the Economic Growth and Infrastructure Committee on 21 October 2015, and confirmed by Cabinet on 27 October 2015.
